overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing a Space Marine in blue power armor sprinting through a dark, misty alien swamp with twisted trees and exotic flora, accompanied by an AI companion, transitioning from dense jungle to ancient ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense alien swamp forest with giant twisted trees

agents.ego_description: sprinting through the swampy forest toward a distant companion

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree trunk with thick twisting roots dominating the background
large rock formation covered in green moss and alien growth
bioluminescent mushroom-like plants with purple and orange caps

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense alien swamp forest with a massive twisted tree dominating the center view. The camera follows the Space Marine running forward through muddy terrain, passing mossy rock walls on the left and exotic fungal growth on the right, establishing the dark, humid atmosphere of the alien world.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky swamp path with red alien flora

events.description: begins closely following companion marine through narrower rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: closely trailing fellow Space Marine through rocky swamp passages

notable_agents.action: fellow Space Marine in blue armor running ahead through the swamp water

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock face forming a narrow passage wall
tall red and orange alien plants growing in dense clusters
murky swamp water covering the ground path

segments.scene_description: The Space Marine follows his companion through a narrower rocky passage with steep mossy walls on the left. The ground becomes covered in shallow swamp water, and distinctive red alien flora appears on the right. The companion marine remains visible ahead, moving through the increasingly enclosed terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow water-filled canyon with hanging vines

events.description: enters narrow canyon passage with deeper water and mist

agents.ego_description: sprinting through shallow water in the misty canyon

notable_agents.action: companion marine moving ahead through the misty canyon exit

entered.detail: tight canyon walls with layered rock strata and moss
long dangling vines hanging from above the canyon
fog-filled narrow exit leading to brighter areas beyond

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow water-filled canyon with steep rock walls closing in on the left. The Space Marine splashes through deeper water while hanging vines drape from above. Mist fills the passage ahead as the companion marine moves toward a brighter exit in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty clearing with ancient stone ruins

events.description: exits narrow canyon into open area with ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: approaching ancient ruins in the misty clearing

notable_agents.action: companion marine entering the ruins area ahead

entered.detail: crumbling stone structures and pillars of an ancient civilization
leafless twisted trees silhouetted against the mist
low-lying alien vegetation covering the clearing floor

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the scene opens into a wide misty clearing with ancient stone ruins rising ahead. Dead trees stand on the left while the companion marine approaches the crumbling structures. The ground transitions from water to grassy alien turf as the environment becomes more exposed and open.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic alien swamp that gradually opens into a wide expanse of ancient ruins. It begins in a dense forest dominated by a massive twisted tree, following a Space Marine as he sprints through muddy terrain flanked by mossy rocks and exotic fungal growths. As the path narrows, the camera tracks the marine and his companion through a rocky passage where the ground shifts to shallow swamp water and red alien flora emerges. The scene then tightens into a water-filled canyon with steep walls and hanging vines, pushing through a thick mist toward a distant light. Finally, the environment expands as the camera emerges from the canyon into a misty clearing, transitioning from water to grassy turf while approaching crumbling stone structures and dead trees.
